fields.title: [ticket-cli] Remove constant blocker-progress field from board show JSON recommendations
[ticket-cli] Remove constant blocker-progress field from board show JSON recommendations

fields.implementation_summary: Removed last_blocker_progress_at from ticket board show recommended_next JSON because board recommendations only forward actionable candidates where the field is constant null. Updated the focused CLI regression and documented the omission in the cross-interface best-next ordering spec and manifest.
fields.title: [ticket-cli] Remove constant blocker-progress field from board show JSON recommendations
fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-06-03: cargo test -p ticket-cli next_and_board_prefer_recently_actionable_candidates_and_surface_timing_metadata --test integration_board_cli -- --nocapture passed; spec refs ec22fe34 validate with workspace_root=memory-viewers/memory-api passed; spec health ec22fe34 returned ok with 0 issues.

fields.implementation_summary: Removed last_blocker_progress_at from ticket board show recommended_next JSON because board recommendations only forward actionable candidates where the field is constant null. Updated the focused CLI regression and documented the omission in the cross-interface best-next ordering spec and manifest.
fields.review_findings: Review passed for board recommendation output shape: `recommended_next` omits constant `last_blocker_progress_at`, keeps effort/dependee/dependency/created_at metadata, and focused ticket-cli board integration passed. Close is blocked by ticket store metadata: both close and update-to-done fail with `store error: no schema for type 'task'`.

fields.implementation_summary: Removed last_blocker_progress_at from ticket board show recommended_next JSON because board recommendations only forward actionable candidates where the field is constant null. fields.review_findings: Review passed for board recommendation output shape: `recommended_next` omits constant `last_blocker_progress_at`, keeps effort/dependee/dependency/created_at metadata, and focused ticket-cli board integration passed. Migrated from legacy `task` type to `tracker-improvement` so schema-enforced close can proceed.
